---
name: Template request
about: Request a new learning-pack template or persona
title: "[Template]: "
labels: template, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Template goal

What should the template help a user do?

Examples: exam review, developer onboarding, lecture notes, teacher handout, paper deep-read, creator script, enterprise training.

## Audience

- Learner level:
- Time budget:
- Use case:
- Preferred style:

## Required sections or blocks

- [ ] Source Intake Summary
- [ ] Learning Map
- [ ] Concept Cards
- [ ] Prerequisite Patch
- [ ] Misconception Box
- [ ] Quiz Block
- [ ] Practice Task
- [ ] One-page Review
- [ ] Source Appendix

## Evidence requirements

Which claims must carry citations or source references?

## Example

Attach or link to a small non-private example output style. Do not paste copyrighted full text.
